/cwe/weakness/1043.Name: Data Element Aggregating an Excessively Large Number of Non-Primitive Elements
/cwe/weakness/1043.Description:
The product uses a data element that has an excessively large
					number of sub-elements with non-primitive data types such as structures or aggregated objects.
/cwe/weakness/1043.ExtendedDescription:
This issue can make the product perform more slowly. If the relevant code is reachable by an attacker, then this performance problem might introduce a vulnerability.


While the interpretation of "excessively large" may vary for each product or developer, CISQ recommends a default of 5 sub-elements.
